strengths: Strong distributed-systems and event-driven architecture experience (e.g., GISCollective, Optilyz)
Proven track record in scaling engineering teams and implementing CI/CD pipelines (e.g., RIDE Capital, Altom Consulting)
Direct involvement in AI-agent infrastructure and developer tooling (e.g., re:cinq, MCP support)
concerns: Limited demonstrated fintech or credit-risk experience in commercial products
No explicit experience with multi-agent AI systems in production fintech contexts
Heavy focus on web/mobile development with less emphasis on real-time inference or financial algorithmic systems

key_factors.factor: Scaling engineering teams in regulated/high-stakes environments

response.justification: Bogdan has strong backend and distributed-systems expertise with evidence of scaling engineering teams and event-driven architectures, including recent work in AI-agent tooling. However, his resume lacks direct fintech or credit-risk system experience, and his agentic AI work appears more tooling-focused than production multi-agent systems in regulated environments. While technically capable, domain alignment with fintech agentic AI is a significant gap.
